name: l3_add_json_format
description: L3: Add --format json flag to the CLI, touching cli.py and formatters.py

turns.message: Add a --format flag to the 'list' command in cli.py that accepts 'table' (default) and 'json'. When --format json is used, call format_json from formatters.py instead of format_table. The format_json function already exists.
